subagent_notes: Harbor dependency audit recommended HARBOR-204 as the next narrow batch after HARBOR-219 retired, covering #203/#204/#205/#206/#207 only.
App and GitHub-truth lanes confirm downstream App/Core work remains blocked on Harbor identity/session API surfaces, but this PR must not claim live browser or site evidence.

remaining_limitations: This PR covers local identity environment Runtime API correction only.
It does not launch real browser sessions, open xiaohongshu/BOSS, capture live screenshots, or generate live site evidence.
It does not complete App packaged runtime supervision, Core real task execution, or Lode registry consumption.
